zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Argentine於1130年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親John de Argentine8歲，母親Ellen FitzGui FitzTecon4歲。他於1160年與Rose DeHalesworth在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1203年在英國享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Argentine was born in 1130, in England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Argentine, was 8 and his mother, Ellen FitzGui FitzTecon, was 4. He married Rose DeHalesworth in 1160, in Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1203, in England, at the age of 74.

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Argentine(이)가 1130년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Argentine(은)는 8세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen FitzGui FitzTecon(은)는 4세였다. 그는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스에서 Rose DeHalesworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1203년 영국에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.
